button_text: Start Practice!

Look at the hint image and select the correct way to talk about what work pressure offers

1.Work pressure offers a great opportunity to develop resilience and strong time management skills.
2.Work pressure is always harmful and should be completely avoided.

Correct answer: 1

Look at the hint image and select the correct way to talk about the drawback of work-life balance

1.Work-life balance is always perfect and never creates any issues at all.
2.While work-life balance offers mental well-being, it also has the risk of reducing urgency and missing critical deadlines.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. What does moderate work pressure offer to a professional trying to grow in their career? Use Structure 1.'

'2. While work pressure offers high performance, what risk does it also bring to the employee? Use Structure 2.'

'3. What does maintaining a healthy work-life balance offer to an employee's overall well-being? Use Structure 1.'

'4. While work-life balance offers personal happiness, what challenge does it also create at the workplace? Use Structure 2.'

'5. What specific advantage does work pressure offer when preparing for high-stakes project deliveries? Use Structure 1.'"
